---
name: Word list contribution
about: Suggest words or questions to add to an existing game
title: "[WORDS] "
labels: content
assignees: ''
---

**Which game / data file?**
e.g. data/phonics.js — Phonics Tap

**Words or questions to add**
Paste them here in the existing data format if possible. Plain text list is also fine.

**Why these words?**
e.g. Common CVC words missing from the current set / high-frequency sight words from Fry list 2

**Source / curriculum alignment (if any)**
e.g. Dolch sight words / UK Letters & Sounds Phase 3 / Fry first 100
